title.en: The Tianshan Dao Ancestor is the top Quadruple ...

content.en:
The Tianshan Dao Ancestor is the top Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and his strength far exceeds that of the ordinary Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and even the gap with the Fivefold Heavenly Dao Ancestor is not very big.

It can be said that there is probably only one Fivefold Heavenly Dao Ancestor in this realm, that is, the founder of Dao Mountain, and he is still the founder of the Dao Ancestor Road - Dao Mountain Dao Ancestor!

However, this time Daoshan Daozu did not come, but the arrival of Tianshan Daozu was enough to shock many people.

Although there are countless opportunities in the battlefield relics, those opportunities are relatively ordinary, and they should not be enough to attract the Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor like the Tianshan Dao Ancestor, maybe when more relics and chances are born, the Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor will truly enter the quasi-Dao realm.

However, the arrival of the Dao Ancestor of the Tianshan Mountains was enough to represent a signal, that is, the Dao Mountain, the first transcendent force, also attached great importance to the fragments of the domain realm.

But whether the fragments of the domain realm can bring them a path beyond the Dao Ancestor, no one knows, but the possibility is not very large, after all, according to the information learned, even in the Divine Heaven Realm, the Domain Ancestor is an incomparably rare supreme existence, and there is only one Domain Ancestor in the Domain Realm.

And what kind of domain ancestor inheritance can a mere domain boundary fragment have?

Of course, even if there is no way to make them surpass Dao Ancestors, if they can go further at the level of Dao Ancestors, it is also a great opportunity, which is enough for countless Dao Ancestors to fight and fight for this.

When the four transcendent forces all appeared, they began to discuss the matter of the quasi-Dao realm.

Soon, a meeting was held in the Chaotic Void outside the Quasi-Dao Realm, and the Dao Ancestors who were qualified to participate in this meeting were basically Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestors and Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestors, and the First and Second Heavenly Dao Ancestors were not qualified to participate in the meeting at all.

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor was also one of the Dao Ancestors who participated in the meeting, but the status of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor was not too high here, after all, the four transcendent forces were all involved, and even the top forces such as the Chaos Trading House and the Giant Axe City did not have a high status.

Seeing that the Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor was almost here, the Heavenly Mountain Dao Ancestor spoke: "Our Dao Mountain has not been aware of the domain boundary fragment for a long time, and we don't know the situation inside, can I please tell me more about it." "

Immediately, one Dao Ancestor said a little about the situation of the domain boundary fragments, but they didn't say much, just some secrets that most people knew, as for the chances and secrets they discovered, they naturally wouldn't tell it.

The Heavenly Mountain Dao Ancestor knew that he really didn't know much about the situation of the Domain Boundary Fragments, and he didn't know much about the Divine Heaven Realm, but as everyone told about it, he gradually understood a lot about the Divine Heaven Realm and the Domain Fragments.

"The Lower Triple Heaven Force, the Middle Triple Heaven Force, the Upper Triple Heaven Force, I don't know what level of power our Dao Mountain belongs to?"

Then.

A Dao Ancestor named Kui Shan spoke: "Tianshan Dao Ancestor, I found a branch of the Middle Triple Heaven Force before, and I learned a little secret, it is said that the standard of the Quadruple Heaven Force in the Middle Triple Heaven Force is a Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor plus hundreds of ordinary Dao Ancestors, and the standard of the Fifth Heaven Force is a Fivefold Heavenly Dao Ancestor plus two hundred ordinary Dao Ancestors, and the Sixth Heaven Force is a Sixfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor plus three hundred ordinary Dao Ancestors!"

"In this case, our Dao Mountain should belong to the Five Heavens Force!"

Tianshan Dao Ancestor said in a low voice.

And above the Five Heavens forces, there are also the Sixth, Seventh, Eighth, and Ninth Heaven forces, and it can be said that there are many such forces in the Divine Heaven Realm.

The Heavenly Mountain Dao Ancestor was not hit, and he didn't care, their realm was already very weak, and there was no need to compete with a big realm like the Divine Heaven Realm.

The only thing he cared about was whether there was a Fivefold Heavenly Dao Ancestor or a Sixfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor among the Domain Boundary Fragments, once there was such a Dao Ancestor, the balance of power in the Realm would be broken.

One of the purposes of his coming here this time was to explore the situation of the powerhouse in the ruins of this Quasi-Dao Realm.

But he had also probed with his divine sense just now, and he couldn't detect the situation of the domain realm ruins at all, as if there were no other ruins except for those few ruins, but according to what he knew, if the ruins were not born, they couldn't find the ruins at all.

Obviously, the ruins of the domain realm were hidden in the quasi-Dao realm by a special concealment method, and even powerful Dao ancestors like them could not find the ruins.

At present, we can only wait for the quasi-Dao realm to grow step by step and eventually become the Dao realm, and those ruins will truly appear.

To put it simply, those ruins are like becoming the secret realm of the Quasi-Dao Realm, and they will not be born at all until a certain period of time.

"This time, our Dao Mountain is going to send some True Monarch disciples and half-step True Ancestor disciples to enter the Quasi-Dao Realm!"

Tianshan Dao Ancestral Road.

"Our forbidden hall has also sent some disciples to enter the quasi-Dao realm!"

"The Chaos Life Alliance also needs to send a large number of True Monarchs and Half-Step True Ancestors into the Quasi-Dao Realm!"

"The Starhorn Clan will also send a large number of clansmen into the Quasi-Dao Realm!"

The four transcendent forces spoke one by one, indicating that they would send the True Monarchs into the Quasi-Dao Realm.

Under normal circumstances, there is a limit to the number of True Monarchs allowed to enter in the Quasi-Dao Realm, and it is also necessary to pay a great price for sending people in again and again.

And last time, they sent countless True Monarchs into the Quasi-Dao Realm, and they paid a great price, almost reaching the maximum limit of the Quasi-Dao Realm, if they sent people in at this time, the price would be too great, and it would be easy to cause the suppression of the origin of the Quasi-Dao Realm, in case the Quasi-Dao Realm suppressed all the True Monarchs in the outside world, the consequences would be too serious.

As a result, the Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestors of the top powers raised opposing opinions one after another.

At this time, the Tianshan Dao Ancestor spoke: "You are worried about the suppression of the Quasi-Dao Realm Origin, but as long as you pay enough price, the Quasi-Dao Realm Origin will not care, after all, it just follows the rules, we can take out a copy of the Dao Realm Origin and sacrifice it to the Quasi-Dao Realm Origin!"

"What, Dao Realm Origin!"

Many of the Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestors were shocked.

How rare the origin of the Dao Realm is, for example, the top forces of the major forces have at most only one Dao Realm, and once the Dao Realm Origin is absorbed, the Dao Realm will be much weaker, for the Dao Realm, the Dao Realm Origin is extremely important.

If someone dares to absorb the origin of the Dao Realm, they will definitely be hostile to the origin of the Dao Realm, unless they are never as good as that Dao Realm, otherwise once they enter, they will be completely suppressed by the Dao Realm.

These forces couldn't take out the Dao Realm Origin at all, and they didn't dare to take it, but Dao Mountain took out the Dao Realm Origin.

Suddenly.

Many Dao Ancestors thought that the four transcendent forces had all destroyed the top powers, and thus also destroyed the Dao Realm, so they all had Dao Realm Origins, so it was very likely that the Dao Realm Origins that they took out this time came from the top great forces that had fallen.

Sacrificing the origin of the Dao Realm, you can naturally send more True Monarchs into the Quasi-Dao Realm, and you can even accelerate the evolution of the Quasi-Dao Realm into the True Dao Realm.

Naturally, the true monarchs of the other big forces would not disagree, so this matter was decided.

"Open!"

The Dao Ancestors of the four transcendent forces took action one after another, and after sacrificing the four Dao Realm Origins, they tore through the barriers of the Quasi-Dao Realm and sent those True Monarchs and half-step True Ancestors into the Quasi-Dao Realm.
